allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pages=d[''''query''''][''''pages'''']; [print\(v[''''imageinfo''''][0][''''url'''']\) for v in pages.values\(\)]")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('C:/claudeEco/projects/Gate/Resources/טבלאות שטחים/35.xlsx', data_only=True\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f'Sheet: {sheet_name}'\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=min\(30, ws.max_row\), values_only=False\):
        vals = [\(c.value, c.coordinate\) for c in row if c.value is not None]
        if vals:
            print\(vals\)
    print\('---'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 -c "
import fitz

for fname, label in [\('21', 'Floor 21'\), \('22', 'Floor 22'\)]:
    doc = fitz.open\(f'C:/claudeEco/projects/Gate/Resources/טבלאות שטחים/{fname}.pdf'\)
    page = doc[0]
    r = page.rect
    clip = fitz.Rect\(0, 0, r.width * 0.45, r.height * 0.35\)
    mat = fitz.Matrix\(4, 4\)
    pix = page.get_pixmap\(matrix=mat, clip=clip\)
    out = f'C:/claudeEco/projects/Gate/Resources/table-{fname}.png'
    pix.save\(out\)
    print\(f'Saved {out} \({pix.width}x{pix.height}\)'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 -c "
import fitz

for fname, label in [\('21', 'Floor 21'\), \('22', 'Floor 22'\)]:
    doc = fitz.open\(f'C:/claudeEco/projects/Gate/Resources/טבלאות שטחים/{fname}.pdf'\)
    page = doc[0]
    r = page.rect
    clip = fitz.Rect\(0, r.height * 0.20, r.width * 0.45, r.height * 0.50\)
    mat = fitz.Matrix\(4, 4\)
    pix = page.get_pixmap\(matrix=mat, clip=clip\)
    out = f'C:/claudeEco/projects/Gate/Resources/table-{fname}-bottom.png'
    pix.save\(out\)
    print\(f'Saved {out} \({pix.width}x{pix.height}\)'\)
")

import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('C:/claudeEco/projects/Gate/Resources/טבלאות שטחים/35.xlsx', data_only=True\)
